ab: siya Gaita ko nagane ki tamali.
siya Dolray ko nagane ki tinali.
yakai ka tangea ka takali ka sawalay, siya Masegesege kai naganeini,tara mangealenga si eea kai cayli ini.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Masegesege，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Masegesege, he is 11 years old.

ab: yakai nai tayangea ki tatakesikesiya twakesi.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: konako si takali ka sawalay madalame nai senay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: madalamako langoy,lo taisadrasadraza maelrelre nai ka cekecekele mwa langolangoy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: madalamako mathingathingale ki bawva ka talragi, la kalekete nai maelrelre senasenay si lwangolwangoy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
